Please Note*
*Heating your meal prior to pickup or delivery incurs a 22% service fee.
Catering Department Hours
Monday – Friday: 9am – 3pm
Saturday and Sunday by Appointment. Please call our catering department at 678-397-1781 to set up an appointment.
Delivery Services
Delivery Times Available:
Monday – Friday: 7:30am – 5pm
Saturday – Sunday: 7:30am – 3pm
Ordering Online
Please place your orders no later than 3pm for next day (Subject to availability).
Ordering Times
Our chefs require a minimum of 24-hours advanced notice! (48-hour advanced notice required on specially ordered items) Please call us for more information.
Cancellation Policy
All cancellations require a 36-hour advanced notice, for Monday cancelations Saturday by 10 am. Cancellations must be requested in writing by e-mailing our catering department at
orders@alons.com.
Alon's Catering
